productDisplayName: Black Coffee Men Black Striped Shirt
description: Composition Black striped formal shirt made of 100% premium cotton, has a spread collar, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, a full length buttoned placket, a chest pocket and a curved hemline Fit Tailored Wash care Machine wash in cold water Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Impeccable cut and luxury construction are a winning sartorial combination - and this shirt from black coffee has both. Lead yourself to a new generation of style and sophistication; perfect for work, it will also sharpen up casual knitwear. Pair it with straight fit, flat front formal trousers and shiny oxfords. Model statistics The product is a size 42 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
